mapper.sql: SELECT c.*, t.name AS teacher_name FROM courses c JOIN teachers t ON t.id = c.teacher_id
mapper.select: WHERE c.teacher_id=#{teacherId} ORDER BY c.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO courses(course_code, course_name, credit, teacher_id, semester) VALUES(#{courseCode}, #{courseName}, #{credit}, #{teacherId}, #{semester})
mapper.update: UPDATE courses SET course_code=#{courseCode}, course_name=#{courseName}, credit=#{credit}, teacher_id=#{teacherId}, semester=#{semester} WHERE id=#{id}
